The Studio

Images made with
intention & care

Northlight Creative is a boutique photo and film studio working with couples, fashion houses, and luxury brands who care about the details — and understand that great images take time to make.

Based in Vancouver, BC. Available worldwide.

340+
Weddings documented
60+
Brand & editorial campaigns
12
Countries worked in

Services

01
Wedding & Events
Full-day coverage with a second shooter, delivered as a curated gallery of 600–800 edited images plus a cinematic short film.
02
Fashion Editorial
Lookbook, campaign, and editorial stills for fashion labels and independent designers. Studio or location.
03
Luxury Brand Film
Short-form video for launches, social, and brand storytelling. Scripted or documentary-style, shot on cinema cameras.
04
Campaign Stills
Product and lifestyle photography for seasonal campaigns, e-commerce, and print.
05
Engagement Sessions
Intimate portrait sessions for couples, used for announcements, invitations, or simply to remember.
06
Destination
Available worldwide for weddings, retreats, and campaigns that take us somewhere beautiful.

Let's make
something beautiful
together.
